allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add temperature, rainfall fields; change workforce to hours

- Added temperature field to daily reports \(e.g. "72°F"\)
- Added rainfall field in inches \(adjustable for site conditions\)
- Changed workforce tracking from headcount \(day/night\) to hours per role
- Updated edit form, view display, and PDF/CSV exports
- Added migration script for existing Supabase databases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Workforce: track Men x Hours for total labor hours

- Each role now has Men count and Hours per person
- Shift Hours auto-populates the hours for all roles
- Total Hours = sum of \(men × hours\) for each role
- Example: 2 laborers × 8 hours = 16 total hours
- Updated edit form, view display, PDF and CSV exports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
